title: Contact - ICBAB 2026
content: Contact Us Get in touch with the organizing committee for any queries regarding ICBAB 2026. Conference Conveners For academic queries, partnerships, or specific concerns, please reach out to our conveners. Convener Dr. Saurabh Bansal Department of Biotechnology & Bioinformatics (+91) 98821-94150 saurabh.bansal@juitsolan.in Convener Dr. Ashok Kumar Nadda Department of Biotechnology & Bioinformatics (+91) 01792-239354 ashok.nadda@juitsolan.in Convener Dr. Shikha Mittal Department of Biotechnology & Bioinformatics (+91) 01792-239224 shikha.mittal@juitsolan.in General Enquiry For general questions regarding registration or the schedule, drop us a message. Full Name Email Address Subject Your Message Send Message Thank You! Your message has been successfully submitted. We will get back to you shortly.
